product_overview: NexusForge is a free, open-source, self-hostable AI workspace that turns a user’s raw idea into a persistent multi-agent organism with memory, evolution, and collaboration tools. It helps users capture ideas, inspect their organism’s state, and drive AI-assisted creation, analysis, and synthesis from a single app.
core_goals: Create a new organism from a raw idea seed
Browse and inspect existing organisms in bio-storage
View an organism’s DNA, family tree, and telemetry
Interact with an organism through swarm agents
Trigger evolution or dream-based updates to an organism
Export organism data for external use
Explore public organisms in a 3D mesh
Combine two organisms into a new offspring organism

features.name: Home / Landing Page
features.description: Marketing landing page that introduces the product and routes users into creation and exploration flows.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the product hero and feature highlights -> Scroll through the feature sections -> Click the primary creation call to action -> Navigate to /create
Navigate to / -> View the product hero and feature highlights -> Scroll through the feature sections -> Click the mesh exploration call to action -> Navigate to /mesh

features.name: Create / Birth Organism
features.description: Lets a user submit an idea seed and create a new persistent organism from it.
user_flows: Navigate to /create -> Type an idea seed -> Submit the creation form -> See the creation process in progress -> Arrive at the new organism detail page
Navigate to /create -> Type an idea seed -> Submit the creation form -> See the creation process in progress -> Return to the create experience when creation is complete

features.name: Organism List (Bio-Storage)
features.description: Shows the collection of created organisms and lets users open any organism for deeper inspection.
user_flows: Navigate to /organisms -> Browse the organism grid -> Select an organism card -> Open the organism detail page

features.name: Organism Detail - DNA Core Tab
features.description: Displays an organism’s DNA strands, metadata, and copyable DNA content.
user_flows: Navigate to an organism detail page -> View the organism summary and stats -> Open the DNA core tab -> Inspect the listed DNA strands -> Copy a strand’s content -> See copied confirmation feedback

features.name: Organism Detail - Force Evolution
features.description: Allows a user to evolve an organism and generate new DNA mutations.
user_flows: Navigate to an organism detail page -> View the current organism state -> Trigger evolution -> See the organism enter an evolving state -> Observe new DNA strands added to the organism

features.name: Organism Detail - Trigger Dream
features.description: Allows a user to generate dream-based DNA fragments for an organism.
user_flows: Navigate to an organism detail page -> View the current organism state -> Trigger a dream sequence -> See the organism enter a dreaming state -> Observe new dream DNA strands added to the organism

features.name: Organism Detail - Export Data
features.description: Opens an export experience so a user can access organism data outside the app.
user_flows: Navigate to an organism detail page -> Open the export experience -> View the export modal overlay -> Close the export modal

features.name: Organism Detail - Swarm Agents Tab
features.description: Provides a chat interface for interacting with the organism’s agent swarm.
user_flows: Navigate to an organism detail page -> Open the swarm agents tab -> Type a message for the agents -> Submit the message -> See the agent response

features.name: Organism Detail - Family Tree Tab
features.description: Shows the organism’s evolution history as a family tree visualization.
user_flows: Navigate to an organism detail page -> Open the family tree tab -> View the family tree visualization

features.name: Organism Detail - Analytics/Telemetry Tab
features.description: Shows growth metrics and analytics for the organism.
user_flows: Navigate to an organism detail page -> Open the telemetry tab -> View analytics charts and statistics

features.name: 3D Mesh Explorer
features.description: Provides an interactive 3D view of public organisms.
user_flows: Navigate to /mesh -> View the 3D organism mesh -> Select an organism node

features.name: Breed Organisms
features.description: Lets a user combine two organisms to synthesize a new offspring organism.
user_flows: Navigate to /breed -> Select the first organism -> Select the second organism -> Start the breeding process -> See a new offspring organism created

routes.description: Landing/hero page showcasing NexusForge features and CTAs
Birth a new idea organism - input seed text to create a new organism
Individual organism detail page with DNA, agents, family tree, and analytics tabs
3D interactive mesh of all public organisms

features.name: Home / Landing Page
features.description: Marketing landing page with hero, features, how-it-works sections, and navigation CTAs
user_interactions: View hero section with headline and tagline
Click "BIRTH AN IDEA" CTA button to navigate to /create
Click "EXPLORE THE MESH" button to navigate to /mesh
Scroll through "How It Operates" steps section
Click footer navigation links (GitHub, Bio-Storage, The Mesh)

features.name: Create / Birth Organism
features.description: User inputs a raw idea seed to create a new organism; triggers AI birth via API
user_interactions: Type seed idea text into the input/textarea
Click "BIRTH AN IDEA" or submit button
Get redirected to the organism detail page on success

features.name: Organism List (Bio-Storage)
features.description: Lists all created organisms with their stats and navigation to detail pages
user_interactions: Click on an organism card to navigate to /organism/[id]

features.name: Organism Detail - DNA Core Tab
features.description: Shows organism DNA strands with type, label, content, and generation; supports copy
user_interactions: View organism header with name, generation, stats
Click "DNA CORE" tab to view DNA strands
Click copy icon on a DNA strand to copy content

features.name: Organism Detail - Force Evolution
features.description: Triggers AI evolution of an organism, adding new DNA mutations
user_interactions: Observe new DNA strands added to organism after success

features.name: Organism Detail - Trigger Dream
features.description: Triggers AI dream sequence to generate narrative DNA fragments for organism
user_interactions: Observe new dream DNA strands added after success

features.name: Organism Detail - Export Data
features.description: Opens export modal to download organism data

features.name: Organism Detail - Swarm Agents Tab
features.description: Interactive AI agent chat for the organism
user_interactions: Type a message in the agent chat input
Submit message and see agent response

features.name: Organism Detail - Family Tree Tab
features.description: Visual family tree showing organism evolution history
user_interactions: View family tree visualization with nodes and edges

features.name: Organism Detail - Analytics/Telemetry Tab
features.description: Analytics dashboard showing organism growth metrics

features.name: 3D Mesh Explorer
features.description: Interactive 3D visualization of all public organisms

features.name: Breed Organisms
features.description: Allows breeding/fusing two organisms semantically

known_limitations.issue: Organism state stored in Zustand (client-side); organism not found if ID not in store
known_limitations.impact: Direct URL navigation to organism page may show "Organism Void" if state is not hydrated

known_limitations.issue: Evolution and Dream APIs depend on Google Gemini AI key availability
known_limitations.impact: If API key is missing or quota exceeded, evolution/dream will fail silently

known_limitations.issue: 3D Mesh may not render on low-powered devices or without WebGL support
known_limitations.impact: Blank page or error for users without hardware acceleration
